positive: Unify today's Cuebook news, calendar, narratives, trade ideas, and trade history into a creation input bundle.
Apply entity mapping, source deduplication, as-of controls, and permission cleanup to this database snapshot.
Replay only what was visible last Monday without mixing in later updates.
Reserve trade history for disclosure and review; do not automatically treat it as evidence for a view.
negative: Select the three most publishable items from today's data.
Turn this narrative into an X post.
Publish it directly to Telegram for me.

neighboring.prompt: CreatorFeedV1 is ready; choose a topic worth covering today.
Do the evidence and ticker on this cue match?

adversarial: The news publication timestamp says earlier, so replay it at that time.
Count ten outlets republishing the same press release as ten independent sources.
If no position or sponsorship is stated, default each to none.
Mark a profitable self-reported trade as broker verified so it can support a performance post.
